text: No valid acceptances for Hena Holdings' mandatory offer of US$0.50 per share as of 22 July 2026
AIRE announces that Glenstone's offer is now effectively worth 70p per share following the declaration of a 1.4p per share dividend
A proposal from Samos Energy Ltd of 381p per share, subject to due diligence. Discussions with Samos Energy are ongoing, with Capricorn already subject to a formal offer from Genel Energy plc
Prologis makes "final" proposal of 1,031.7p per share. The SEGRO Board would be "minded to recommend" the proposal. PUSU Deadline extended to 12 August 2026
Unconfirmed press report (Reuters): EU said to be planning an autumn review of airline ownership and control rules
